description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 16 hrs 32 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 23 mins. His WakaTime activity was spread across 5 projects, and his most-used languages were Java (53%), Other (28%), and Markdown (18%). No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded this week.
